subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-04-22
subcodes.first_line: Horticulture is one of the most fascinating arts. I love it and watch the growth of the trees and flowers as one watches the growth of the babes.
subcodes.subjects: @creativity in art, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @agriculture
